last_verdict.tests: 1852 passed, 12 skipped (.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -m 'not real_model and not recorded and not live_output'). +71 vs the 1781 mid-day baseline (watch/monitor capability suite + redactor regression). venv MINIMAL after the env wipe; ~12 heavy-dep tests self-skip; use .venv/bin/python.

next: DONE 2026-06-16 (WATCH/MONITOR CAPABILITY shipped v1 + a pre-existing PII leak fixed; all merged to main, 1852 green). Built the north-star 'watch/monitor for events' capability security-first via multi-agent fan-out (design panel -> implement spine -> independent per-invariant tests -> 5-agent adversarial security review). Merge 7bc8aa5 / commit 8896cbc. WHAT IT IS: the assistant watches ONE owner-granted app window for a described event and speaks one alert -- observe+speak only, never actuates. core/watch.py (WatchGrant/GrantStore/TextMatchEvaluator/WatchManager + attach_watch_capability: watch.grant/start/stop owner-gated, watch.list read-only) + core/watch_source.py (scoped WindowResolver/WatchSource seam, X11-only v1, fake-able for Tier-0). Wired default-OFF in runtime.py/app.py; config.json ships watch.enabled=false grants=[]; docs/unified_architecture.md §8. SECURITY (all enforced+tested): default-deny; owner-verified LIVE_AUDIO via always_on_agent.origin (strict is True); planner_tool=False so the LLM can never arm/list/egress a watcher; window-scoped capture never full-screen; ephemeral frames; redact_pii(force=True)+spotlight-fence on any spoken evidence/label/condition; single shared poller w/ max_active cap + min-interval; grants machine-local in config.local.json only. Adversarial review found+fixed: HIGH alert leaked label/condition verbatim into the committed bundle (now redacted); MEDIUM substring wm_class spoof (now EXACT match, see wm_class_matches); MEDIUM ReDoS on owner /regex/ over OCR text on the shared poller (now safe_search: rejects nested quantifiers + bounds haystack); LOW _persist clobbered config.local.json on a corrupt file (now backs up + aborts). ALSO fixed a PRE-EXISTING redactor leak surfaced by the watch tests: always_on_agent.untrusted._CARD_RE greedily spanned a card into an abutting digit run (card+SSN) -> failed Luhn -> raw card leaked (affected durable records + cloud egress too). _redact_card_span recovers the Luhn-valid window. DEFERRED HARDENING (noted, not blockers): push owner-verify into WatchManager/GrantStore primitives (defense-in-depth); pin a watch to its resolved win_id for lifetime; hard-fail capability reconciliation on a planner_tool/side_effecting mismatch; Wayland/macOS/Windows resolver backend; NL->grant/condition intent extraction (v1 reads structured args from the capability context). Carried owner to-dos unchanged: enroll speaker-ID (gates watch.grant/start like all actions); cloud default-OFF; rotate leaked Gemini key + D1 history purge.
